race.comment: DIAMOND GUST (5) looks well placed to break through here. Three runs this time in have been rock solid, just finding the talented All Business too strong last start at Geelong. He's been given a freshen since then and finds what looks to be an ideal race. PAVLICH (6) resumes. He was a narrow maiden winner before a spell, winning by a nose at Kilmore. He's only off a short spell so should hold some residual fitness and has plenty of upside. MARLION'S DREAM (7) ran well fresh at Pakenham over 1200m, getting home late to grab third. The extra distance will suit nicely and he'll be hard to hold out. LULU DARLING (8) was just fair at Pakenham last time but had been knocking on the door prior and will be up on speed here. QUELLO DORATO (4) resumes with the ability to win if forward enough.
